products.name: ALCE NERO
pros: Contains real passata, no added water

products.name: CASAR

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2025 test recommends ALCE NERO and CASAR as top passata brands; the study confirms they contain real passata without added water and are priced competitively. The evidence is fresh (published June 2025).
